sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105430" key="tri/xordos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρί-χορδος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105430.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with three strings,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βάρβιτος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0406.tlg001:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (but <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.60</biblScope> </bibl> gives <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-χορδον</foreign> as the name of the instrument); <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρίχορδα</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ποιήματα</foreign>) <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1137b</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀλιγόχορδα</foreign> cj. Volkmann).</sense> </entryFree>
